temporal_description: A low-angle, static shot captures a cityscape at dusk. The sky is a deep, moody blue. In the foreground, the dark silhouettes of trees and a lit streetlamp are visible. The main focus is on several large, modern office buildings. One prominent building in the center has a unique, recessed upper level. A crane is visible on the roof of a building in the background. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The audio features a female narrator speaking in a serious and informative tone, characteristic of a news report. Her voice is clear and steady as she delivers the information with a sense of gravity. In the background, a low, tense, and slightly ominous electronic hum plays, creating a suspenseful and serious atmosphere that complements the news of a crime. The narrator states, "下午時分，在上環區發生的槍擊案，三名兇徒死亡，另外有多..." which translates to "In the afternoon, in a shooting incident in Sheung Wan district, three suspects were killed. In addition, there are many..." The scene cuts to an interior shot of an office, viewed from behind a group of people. The individuals, mostly men in light-colored, collared shirts, are standing and watching a small television screen mounted on a far wall. The office is modern, with glass partitions, filing cabinets, and office furniture. A large, dark pendant light hangs from the ceiling. The same white Chinese characters, "风行网," remain in the top left corner. The camera is stationary, providing a wide view of the office environment and the people observing the screen. The audio cuts off before she can finish the sentence.
